data_coverage_summary: Samsara Compliance & ELD provides current HOS clocks, historical HOS logs, daily duty-status summaries, and driver-level compliance settings, allowing integrations to both ingest compliance records and update driver ELD/HOS configuration fields.
buyer_guidance: Use Compliance & ELD when Last Mile needs driver-hours visibility, audit support, or policy synchronization. This domain is not an asset-management surface, but it does expose time-based operational compliance telemetry and selective driver-setting writeback.
overview: The Compliance & ELD guide documents read access to current HOS clocks, historical HOS logs, and summarized daily duty-status activity, while the Drivers guide documents create and patch workflows for driver records and compliance-related driver fields such as ELD exemptions, personal conveyance, yard moves, carrier settings, and state-specific ruleset overrides. That combination makes this domain both analytically useful and operationally writable for compliance administration.

available_data.description: The guide separates current HOS status from historical and summarized compliance retrieval.
data_points: current duty status and remaining drive/break/cycle values
historical HOS log sequences with timestamps and associated vehicles
daily summaries with duty-status durations, distance, and certification state

available_data.description: The Drivers guide documents create, retrieve, list, update, deactivate, and re-activate flows for drivers.
data_points: driver account identity and activation status
carrier settings and home terminal overrides

available_data.description: Samsara documents several compliance fields as patchable on the driver object.
data_points: adverse weather and Big Day exemptions

ingest_considerations: HOS logs reflect the current edited state, so integrations should be prepared to re-pull logs after carrier or driver edits.
Driver deactivation is a PATCH operation rather than a hard delete, which is important for preserving compliance history.
This domain is not intended for asset telemetry; treat it as driver/compliance workflow data even when vehicle assignments appear in daily summaries.
Ruleset and exemption updates are sensitive operational writes and should be tightly permissioned.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Backed by the Compliance & ELD guide for GET /fleet/hos/clocks, GET /fleet/hos/logs, and GET /fleet/hos/daily-logs, plus the Drivers guide for POST /fleet/drivers and PATCH /fleet/drivers/{driverId} including HOS and ELD compliance fields.
